channel.title: Email on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in Email on Have an average day :|

item.title: BBC News - Emails from dead man's account spook loved ones
item.description: BBC News – Emails from dead man’s account spook loved ones. This gives me an idea for an interesting project. Create a deadmans-email-switch to send out emails after a point of no activity that contain letters to friends and love ones to help ease their morning. I think that would be a pretty nice service to have.
